team.date_founded: The oldest club in the Asteroid Belt, founded by the first deep-core mining crews on the dwarf planet Ceres.
team.number_of_fans: Around 23 million, the proud old guard of belt football.
team.badge: A pickaxe crossed with a drill over a grey dwarf-planet disc.
team.home_kit: Earth-brown and slate with an ore-seam pattern across the chest.
team.third_kit: Deep-core black with a single ore-vein stripe.
team.history: Ceres Miners are the toughest, oldest club in the belt — a defensive, unyielding side that grinds opponents into the regolith. They concede little and complain less, the embodiment of belt grit.
team.club_culture: Old, hard, and proud. The Diggers measure worth in graft and longevity.
team.political_leaning: Belt old-frontier — the conservative heart of belt labour.
trophy_cabinet: The belt's oldest and most storied honours board
legends: Bedrock Hane — the centre-back who anchored a generation of Diggers sides
achievements: Most clean sheets in belt history

stadium.date_built: Carved into the Cerean surface during the first mining boom.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the dwarf-planet's mining consortia.
stadium.pitch_size: Compact, suited to the deep defensive block.
stadium.pitch_type: Hardy synthetic turf rated for low gravity.
stadium.bio: The Rock is exactly that — a hard, cold, unforgiving ground where the old belt crowd appreciates a clearance as much as a goal. Visitors leave bruised and pointless.

training_facility.date_built: A standard complex maintained on a careful budget.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded by the Cerean mining unions.
training_facility.bio: The Ceres Deep Training Complex drills organisation, low-gravity duels, and the patient defending that has defined the belt's oldest club for generations.

manager.appearance: Grizzled and unsmiling, with the heavy hands of a former miner.
manager.bio: Gravel Asante is the elder statesman of belt management — a defensive purist who has made the Diggers impossible to break down for decades. He trusts the block and despises risk.
manager.playing_history: A hard-as-rock centre-back in his day.
manager.playing_philosophy: Concede nothing. The belt rewards those who endure.
manager.culture: The keeper of the belt's oldest defensive faith.
achievements: Built the belt's most resilient defence

managing_staff.appearance: Solid and quiet, drills duels in the low Cerean gravity.
managing_staff.bio: Ore Petrakis specialises in low-gravity mechanics, teaching the Diggers to win every duel where the bounce is strange and the footing stranger.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Master the gravity and you master the duel.

players.appearance: Solid and unflustered, commands his box.
players.bio: Drill Vasquez is the balanced keeper who anchors the Diggers' deep block with quiet authority.
achievements: Most clean sheets in the belt

players.appearance: Tireless and rugged, grafts the flank.
players.bio: Vein Torres is the workhorse full-back who never stops working the right channel.
achievements: Most distance covered by a defender

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the heart of the block.
players.bio: Ore Kane is the team-first defender who keeps the Diggers disciplined and deep.

players.appearance: Combative and hard, relishes the duel.
players.bio: Shaft Walker is the aggressive enforcer who wins the dirty battles in the low gravity.
achievements: Most duels won in the side

players.appearance: Balanced and watchful, reads the danger.
players.bio: Seam Rivera is the composed defender who snuffs out attacks before they form.

players.appearance: Inventive and rare, the lone creator.
players.bio: Dig Chen is the creative spark the defensive Diggers hide their attacking hopes in.
achievements: Most chances created in the side

players.appearance: Willing and selfless, the midfield shield.
players.bio: Pick Petrov is the team-first midfielder who screens the old defence tirelessly.

players.appearance: Balanced and steady, keeps the ball.
players.bio: Tunnel Morales is the composed midfielder who refuses to give possession away cheaply.
achievements: Highest pass retention in the side

players.appearance: Strong and predatory, the lone spearhead.
players.bio: Strike Yamamoto is the selfish target striker who must convert the Diggers' rare chances.
achievements: Club top scorer in a low-scoring side

players.appearance: Direct and combative, supports the striker.
players.bio: Quarry Nakamura is the aggressive forward who battles to win the Diggers territory.
achievements: Most fouls won by a forward

players.appearance: Self-assured and sharp, the wide threat.
players.bio: Blast Fischer is the selfish wide forward who carries the rare counter, hungry for goals.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Crusher Tanaka is the cautious veteran second keeper, dependable when called.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Cobalt Kim is the team-first deputy who keeps the block solid when the starters rest.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Flint Osei is the promising young defender being hardened the Cerean way.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Nugget Park is the creative deputy who offers a rare spark from the bench.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Splint Beck is the eager young finisher pushing for a place at the belt's oldest club.
